node.text: @parishilton brought the party, you made it a moment. Buy your Baby Three x T-Mobile No Filter today and keep an eye out for more member only exclusives in 2026
The Baby Three x T-Mobile collab went off. There are still a few available at our Times Square store and Alderwood mall location so hurry over to buy yours!

node.text: Mischievous but sweet, catch your Baby Three x T-Mobile No Filter before they get away. Buy yours 12.13.25. Members-only.

Introducing the Baby Three x T-Mobile No Filter series. Which one will be your adventure partner? Catch them on 12.13.25. Members only.

KIKFLIP is a Gemini, which means pocket-sized power. Full-size attitude. witty, unpredictable, full of ideas. Kikflip is a walking playlist: one minute skater, one minute style icon.

TRIP is a Cancer so goes for laid-back style. Energy that never drops. Trip’s that friend who keeps everyone together caring underneath. And always sends the “made it home safe” text.

ZING is an Aries so he’s flashy and fun. Lights up every room. He’s always the first to show up and is spark that kicks off the party.

BLING is a Sagittarius. Bright aura and shine. Made for moments in the spotlight. Bling lives for the big stage, the bold moment, the sparkle. The one posting “stay tuned” before anyone knows why.

LUXE is a Taurus so is chill and stylish. Always online, always cool. Luxe has that grounded but glam vibe: steady Wi-Fi, steady energy, and the best outfit every time.

MOFI is a Virgo. Quick and slick. Always ready to switch it up. Mofi’s the problem-solver of the group — adaptable, organized, and low-key perfectionist. Keeps the vibe glitch-free.

ZUMO is the Leo of the group. Polished and glowing. Never buffers. Zumo’s the natural star: main-character energy wrapped in pure shine.

WINK is a Libra. Charming and effortlessly rare. Magenta style in motion. Wink is pure charm. All grace, all glow, all group-photo energy. Can’t take a bad angle.
​Cozy called. We answered. Members get a free blanket in the T-Life app thanks to Tuesdays.

node.text: See for yourself what everyone’s talking about with T-Mobile 5G Home Internet
The Baby Three x T-Mobile No Filter collab is coming! Buy yours 12.13.25. Members-only.
Race season may be over, but we’re just getting started. #LasVegasGP renewed. #USGP unlocked

node.text: It started under the lights for @gronk, @patrickmahomes, and @djlagway. Now it’s about who’s next. #FN5GL
Dinner plans? Handled. Score a free Jumbo Jack® Cheeseburger w/$1 min spend. Redeem in the T-Life app. That’s Magenta Status.
